headline: How Investors Are Reacting To Nasdaq (NDAQ) Index Revamp And Fintech Push With Georgia Partnership
summary: Nasdaq Inc. recently updated the parent indices and methodologies for certain Xtrackers (IE) plc funds, shifting them to the Nasdaq Global Disruptive Technology Benchmark2 Index while keeping a broadly consistent thematic approach. At the same time, Nasdaq is drawing attention for expected improvements in Q2 2026 earnings and a new Calypso technology partnership with the National Bank of Georgia, together underscoring its push to grow fintech and index-services revenues. headline: Georgia's Five Largest Banks to Transform Treasury Infrastructure in Landmark Partnership Between Nasdaq Calypso and The National Bank of Georgia
